calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Sanctions imposed on Dec-19-2017, Mar-20-2019, and Mar-05-2019 are ordered vacated in open court. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Russell Robinson, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jul-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Continued To May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-07-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Continued To Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Plaintiff DANIEL BOREEN appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made.

The Court confirms with Mr. Boreen that Mr. Boreen filed an amended complaint on 11/27/18. As such, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and takes Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer OFF CALENDAR.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/HK)
